newsSince: Constructive: Q1 2026 beat with a strong tone — AI cited as the main demand driver, customers accelerating AI-infra capacity, 1.4nm pilot-line production starting H2 2026, and management framing 2026 as a strong upcycle year at 2nm/1.4nm with H2>H1. ALD/epi intensity and GAA confirm the picks-and-shovels thesis. Stock +11% since June 9.

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent under-covered AI supply chain: Q1 beat and 1.4nm/GAA upcycle confirm the ALD-intensity thesis, a modest positive. But ASM is already a well-recognized AI semicap beneficiary, so it is not truly latent on this lens; small uptick, hold near the tail.
verdicts.bull: ALD/epi intensity rises step-function at GAA and 1.4nm; structural content-per-wafer winner on AI capex.
verdicts.neutral: Already a consensus AI semicap name — limited 'hidden' aspect for a latent list.
verdicts.bear: Front-end capex cyclicality and rich valuation after a +79% YTD run.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: 1.4nm pilot ramp H2 2026 and GAA/ALD content gains.

verdicts.rankRationale: AI-node-bottleneck lens fits ASM best: Q1 beat plus 1.4nm pilot lines H2 2026 and GAA-driven ALD intensity directly tighten the advanced-node bottleneck. Fundamentally positive and confirms top-10 placement; uptick within the leaders.
verdicts.bull: ALD is a hard advanced-node bottleneck; AI-led 2nm/1.4nm and HBM/packaging spend drives content and pricing.
verdicts.neutral: High-quality but well-owned; much upside already in a +79% YTD.
verdicts.bear: Valuation and capex-cycle sensitivity if AI digestion slows.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: GAA/1.4nm ALD content ramp and rising AI-chip capex.

verdicts.rankRationale: CPO/technology-linkage lens: ALD/epi complexity rises at advanced nodes and ASM is engaged in advanced-packaging/heterogeneous integration that underpins photonics manufacturing. Q1 beat incrementally confirms the linkage; modest positive, mid-list rank still fits.
verdicts.bull: Advanced-node + heterogeneous-integration intensity supports the substrates and photonics packaging CPO needs.
verdicts.neutral: Linkage to co-packaged optics is real but indirect; richly valued.
verdicts.bear: Capex-cycle risk; CPO is a secondary, not core, driver.
